step_rationale: TLR-dependent inflammatory signaling driving monocyte recruitment and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: MyD88 transduces toll-like-receptor signals that drive monocyte recruitment and vascular inflammation destabilizing atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: Guanmaitong Granule Attenuates Atherosclerosis by Inhibiting Inflammatory Immune Response in ApoEMice Fed High-Fat Diet.
